blended.narrative: Mission Ridge is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 13".
